text: Hello? Hello. Are you there? Yes. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? No, I don't have Medicare. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
